prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up: 2/5 stars. Product performs adequately in most conditions, though consistency varies—occasional premature initiation and unwanted early-morning interruptions are common. Packaging (eyes sealed shut) misleadingly implies prolonged retention, but light leakage frequently disrupts intended cycle. Suggested improvements include darker packaging, optional snooze feature with firmer enforcement, and reduced internal alarm volume. Does not recommend for individuals seeking uninterrupted downtime. Overall, serviceable but overhyped. Long-term durability unconfirmed due to daily recurrence.
